agents.name: Marsha Watson
agents.title: Realtor & Team Lead
agents.bio: With over two decades in Triangle real estate, Marsha leads Core Collective with a precision listing strategy that consistently delivers above-asking results for luxury sellers.

agents.name: Sharon McDuffie
agents.title: Realtor · Buyer Specialist
agents.bio: Sharon's insider network and relentless negotiation style give buyers a decisive edge — from first-time homeowners to families upgrading into premier neighborhoods.

agents.name: Sylvia T. Wheeler
agents.title: Realtor · Relocation Expert
agents.bio: Sylvia guides relocating families through every detail — neighborhood matching, school research, and seamless closings across Chapel Hill, Durham, and beyond.

agents.name: Dexter Drayton
agents.title: Realtor · Investment Advisor
agents.bio: Dexter partners with investors to identify high-yield assets across the Triangle — combining sharp financial analysis with an unmatched off-market deal pipeline.
